    T

    test - package test
     
    Tile - Class in track
    Tile.java Code Description: This class represents a single Tile/Pixel of the track.
    Tile(int, int, char) - Constructor for class track.Tile
    Constructor, Track will read a double array and pass XPos, YPos, and tileType
    Tile.Surface - Enum Class in track
    Enumeration to store surface data
    tileType - Variable in enum class track.Tile.Surface
     
    TIME_TO_UPDATE - Static variable in class car.CarController
    Time between game updates in milliseconds.
    TIME_TO_UPDATE - Static variable in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Time between game updates in milliseconds.
    track - package track
     
    Track - Class in track
    Track.java Code Description: This class represents a Track in Java.
    Track(String, int) - Constructor for class track.Track
    Constructor for Track class
    TrackDrawerGUI - Class in track
    TrackDrawerGUI.java Code description: This program allows me to visually edit a track so I can generate new tracks.
    TrackDrawerGUI() - Constructor for class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Constructor for TrackDrawerGUI, sets up GUI
    TrackGenerator - Class in track
    TrackGenerator.java Code Description: This class generates files for track generation.
    TrackGenerator() - Constructor for class track.TrackGenerator
     
    TrackPackageTest - Class in test
    TrackPackageTest.java Code Description: This is the test class for all classes that can be tested in the track package.
    TrackPackageTest() - Constructor for class test.TrackPackageTest
    Constructor for TrackPackageTest, runs tests for all testable classes in track package
    TrackPanel - Class in track
    TrackPanel.java Code Description: This class represents the visual Track.
    TrackPanel(Track, int) - Constructor for class track.TrackPanel
    Constructor for TrackPanel
    turn(double) - Method in class car.Car
    Rotates the car by the specified angle.
